room.caption: [MCA] Oh hey, an entrance!
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(93)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backMagicalCastleA backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(30) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1232 newMapY=272 toRoom=rMain_78 colorChange=1

sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false exitType=0 newMapX=2768 newMapY=320 toRoom=rMC_K y+=32
if global.gameProgress<=4990 {instance_destroy()}
